accounting.description: Ke toan SME Viet Nam — hoa don, cong no, doi soat ngan hang, du bao dong tien, chi phi. Ket noi MISA AMIS.

bds-broker.description: Trợ lý môi giới bất động sản — lọc sản phẩm, gửi thông tin dự án, gửi ảnh, đặt lịch xem nhà

setup_prompts.label: Telegram User ID của admin (nhiều ID cách nhau bằng dấu phẩy)

bi.description: Dashboard & bao cao SME Viet Nam — tong quan CEO, P&L, dong tien, cong no, xu huong doanh thu.

campaign.description: Campaign cho SME — chay su kien gather interest, email/LinkedIn outreach theo plan, online ads. Dua khach hang tu NEW → ENGAGED.

setup_prompts.label: Ngon ngu mac dinh cho email/content (vi hoac en)
Playbook mac dinh khi khong chi dinh

crm.description: CRM cho SME Viet Nam — quan ly danh ba, enrich thong tin, phan nhom, diem score, la nen tang cho cac skill ban hang & marketing khac.

setup_prompts.label: Apollo.io API key (optional — de lai trong neu khong co)

ecom-bot.description: Generic e-commerce sales bot — product consultation, ordering, order tracking. Use with --profile to customize for specific domains.

engagement.description: Conversion flow cho SME — daily BD actions, outreach state machine, reply handling, meeting prep. Dua khach hang tu ENGAGED → QUALIFIED → PROPOSAL → WON.

setup_prompts.label: Ngon ngu mac dinh cho daily briefing (vi hoac en)

finance-tracker.description: Trợ lý chi tiêu cá nhân — ghi giao dịch vào CSV local, xem báo cáo ASCII. Chạy trên web/telegram, không cần OAuth. Song ngữ Việt/Anh.

gog.description: Google Workspace CLI - Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, Docs

hr.description: Nhan su SME Viet Nam — quan ly nhan vien, tinh luong BHXH/TNCN, nghi phep, hop dong lao dong.

legal.description: Phap ly SME Viet Nam — tra cuu luat doanh nghiep, theo doi giay phep, hop dong lao dong, luat thue.

marketing.description: Marketing content cho SME Viet Nam — tao bai dang social media, noi dung blog/landing page, A/B copy. Khong quan ly email campaign (xem sme-campaign).

openclaw-social.description: Social media content planner cho OpenClaw — 2 bai/tuan tren Facebook (Mon + Thu 10am ICT). Topic buckets co san, validate cadence, draft → approve → schedule workflow.

setup_prompts.label: Ten nguoi post (hien tren draft, vd 'Khoa')

ops.description: Van hanh SME Viet Nam — quan ly cong viec, tai lieu, cuoc hop, giay phep, phe duyet.

proposal.description: Proposal generator cho SME — viet proposal chuyen nghiep, export PDF qua Manus AI, 7-step pipeline tu client data → outline → approve → PDF.

setup_prompts.label: Manus AI API key (bat buoc de tao PDF)
Ten doanh nghiep cua ban (hien len proposal)

reminder.description: Daily BD coach cho SME — tu dong goi y 'hom nay/ngay mai nen outreach ai va lam gi' dua tren pipeline cell (research-backed). Kich hoat khi user noi 'nhac toi', 'ai can follow-up', 'daily outreach', 'remind me', hoac khi cron fire morning/evening briefing.

rockship-support.description: Rockship support consultant — answers questions about OpenClaw, Rockship services, and Rockship's past work. Use this skill whenever someone asks about OpenClaw, Rockship, how to install OpenClaw, pricing, use cases, troubleshooting, Rockship's case studies, past projects, web development services, AI solutions, or anything related to Rockship as a company. Trigger even for casual questions like "what is openclaw", "how do I get started", "which plan should I choose", "what has Rockship built before", or "my openclaw is not working".

sales.description: Ban hang fulfillment cho SME Viet Nam — bao gia local, don hang, payment terms. Khong lam CRM/campaign/engagement/proposal (xem sme-crm, sme-campaign, sme-engagement, sme-proposal).

sol-finance-coach.description: Tro ly tai chinh ca nhan 24/7 — kien thuc dau tu, meo tiet kiem, toi uu the tin dung, theo doi chi tieu, gamification. Chay tren Telegram/Zalo, khong truy cap ngan hang.

tax.description: Thue SME Viet Nam — lich nop thue, tinh TNCN, VAT, TNDN, nhac han. Xuat XML cho HTKK.
